title: Cancer Knot Wrap
description: Releasing as part of our Zodiac 2024 collection, Cancer Knot Wrap is a reusable gift wrapping option, made from 100% recycled plastic bottles.

images.alt: Cancer. A playfully fun, square knot wrap with clouds and crabs on blue skies on each corner. There is a large red crab in the centre of a colourfully banded circle filled with aquatic creatures and affiliations.
The model is sat in a roll-top bathtub facing away, on a pastel, star-filled background. They have fashioned the Cancer knot wrap into a playful hair wrap holding up their blonde ponytail.
The model is sat in a roll-top bathtub facing away, on a pastel, star-filled background. They have fashioned the Cancer knot wrap into a playful hair wrap holding up their blonde ponytail.
A super close-up of the Cancer knot wrap focuses on the texture and dimension of the fabric and the vividity of the colours.
